TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-intro_ofad

S.FORM: nga’ay ho.
S.TRANSL: 大家好。
Hello.

S.FORM: ci Ofad Kacaw ku ngangan aku.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Ofad Kacaw。
My name is Ofad Kacaw.

S.FORM: u niyaro’ aku itira i pusun i kakacawan ku ciwkangan.
S.TRANSL: 我的故鄉在台東長濱長光。
My hometown is in Ciwkangan, in Taitung, in Kakacawan.

S.FORM: na nu emang ku X itira i ciwkangan a matuas tahira i tulu ku safaw nu mihecaan.
S.TRANSL: 我從小就在長光部落長大，一直到十三歲。
I grew up in Ciwkangan until I was thirteen.

S.FORM: miliad tu luma’ tayra i heto a mitilid tahira tu i kokiw maherek misawad tu itira.
S.TRANSL: （我）離開家到屏東讀書，一直到高中畢業以後。
(I) left home and went to Pingtung to study until I graduated from high school.

S.FORM: mi harakat tu tu sakalahitai.
S.TRANSL: 我準備當兵。
I was about to serve in the army.

S.FORM: maherak tu a malahitai u sasuwal nu matuasay maedeng tu kisu u fahinayan tu kisu.
S.TRANSL: 退伍以後，老人家說，「你可以了。你已經是成年男子了。」
After finishing the military service, the elderly said,‘You have become a grown-up man.’

S.FORM: maedeng tu kisu cifafahi’ sa’an saka.
S.TRANSL: 「你可以結婚了。」
‘You can marry now.’

S.FORM: itiya u roma miheca cifafahi’ tu kaku.
S.TRANSL: 因此，隔年，我就結婚了。
Then, I got married the following year.

S.FORM: maherek cifafahi’ kaku tangsul sa tayni i taypak.
S.TRANSL: 我結婚之後沒多久就到台北。
After I got married, I came to Taipei immediately.

S.FORM: itini i taypak i anu saosien ku mihecaan itira i enem polo’ ira ku saka tulu.
S.TRANSL: 在台北算算年份，是在民國六十三年。
It was around 1974 (when I came) to Taipei.

S.FORM: malumed aca ku katayni aku i taypak.
S.TRANSL: 我到台北來運氣非常好。
I felt lucky to have come to Taipei.

S.FORM: roma miheca tangsul kaku mi misikin tu nu pakayni i hikociw a sikin saka itira kaku i matayal tah tahira anini.
S.TRANSL: 我隔年馬上參加航空站考試，在那邊服務一直到現在。
The following year I immediately took an examination for a job at an airport; I am still working there now.

S.FORM: tulu tu polo’ ku mihecaan ku tayal aku itira.
S.TRANSL: 我在那邊工作已經三十年了。
I have worked there for thirty years.

S.FORM: tuninian a tayal nu maku pakayniay tu nu pancah itira i saka pitu polo’ mihecaan sa ira ku lima.
S.TRANSL: 我從事阿美族語的工作，是在七十五年。
It is in 1986 that I engaged in the work on Amis.

S.FORM: malumed kaku itiya ira ci Afan a singsi.
S.TRANSL: 那一年我很幸運，認識了Afan（方敏英）老師。
I was lucky to meet Professor Afan.

S.FORM: misanga’ kaku tu citen nu pancah sa’an ku suwal nira saka.
S.TRANSL: 他說：「我要製作阿美語的字典。」
‘I am going to compile an Amis dictionary,’ he said.

S.FORM: mikilimay tu mami falic tu tilid nu pancah malu mifalic sa nu holam.
S.TRANSL: 他在找一位把翻譯阿美語的書翻成漢語的人。
He is looking for someone to translate Amis into Chinese.

S.FORM: saka mitayalay kaku itiya.
S.TRANSL: 所以我在那個時候工作。
Therefore I accepted the job then.

S.FORM: sarakat aku micamul a mitayal tu tilid nu pancah itiya.
S.TRANSL: 在那個時候我首次參與阿美語文的工作。
It was the first time that I participated in the work on the Amis language.

S.FORM: ta mafana’ kaku tu ka tada kafangcal ku tilid nu pancah.
S.TRANSL: 從那時我才知道阿美語文非常的優美。
From then on, I realized that the Amis language is beautiful.

S.FORM: u caciaw nu pancah u facu nu pancah mae’min a fangcal.
S.TRANSL: 阿美語和它的結構，全部都優美。
The speech and the structure of the Amis language are all beautiful.

S.FORM: saka itiya sa tu kaku minengneng manga’ay kini parayrayen ku tilid nu pancah.
S.TRANSL: 所以從那個時候，我發覺可以將阿美語的文字傳承下去。
Therefore, I realized that it was good to preserve the Amis language.

S.FORM: sa’an ku falucu’ aku itiya.
S.TRANSL: 當時我是如此想的。
That was what I thought then.

S.FORM: roma miheca tayra tu kaku i yanjiuyuan a matayal tu mialaay tu ngiha’ nu matuasay ho.
S.TRANSL: 隔年我到了研究院工作，去採集老人家的口述。
The following year, I went to Academia Sinica to work and collect elders’ speech.

S.FORM: nawhani u orip nu pancah awa’ay ku tilid.
S.TRANSL: 因為阿美族文化裡，沒有文字。
Because there was no written language in Amis culture.

S.FORM: awa’ay ku suwal saka itinitini aca i kimad nu pancah a miala ta ma fana’ tu orip nu pancah itiya ho tahira sa anini.
S.TRANSL: 僅僅能透過口述採集，才知道阿美族的文化，從古至今。
Only by collecting Amis narratives could we learn about the Amis culture in the past and present.

S.FORM: malasingsi tu kaku tu nu pancah.
S.TRANSL: 所以那時候我當了阿美語老師。
Therefore I became an Amis teacher.

S.FORM: mikinkiw mikadkad tu kaku tu tilid tahira i falu polo’ enem ku mihecaan .
S.TRANSL: 我研究探討文字直到八十六年。

S.FORM: haenhan ku pasifana’ tu wawa ca’ay ka reko saka.
S.TRANSL: 如此教育小孩，不充實。
This way of teaching children is not good enough.

S.FORM: tuya miheca misanga kaku tu cudad malu cudad nu pasifana’ tu wawa.
S.TRANSL: 所以那一年我出版了一本書，作為教小孩用的書。
Thus I published a book that year, as teaching materials for children.

S.FORM: saka tahanini sa ku tayal nu maku tu pakayniay tu nu pancah.
S.TRANSL: 所以我從事阿美語文工作一直到現在。
Thus I worked on the Amis language up till now.
